location: Guaranteed drop from the Tree Sentinel Duo, fought at the top of the stairs leading to the Outer Wall Phantom Tree grace, the southern gate into Capital Outskirts.
tactics: Two Tree Sentinels fight together — one wields a shield and lance, the other a torch and lance; run past them to reach the Outer Wall Phantom Tree grace first, then pull them apart to fight one at a time.
Lightning damage is especially effective against both Sentinels.
The kill also awards a Hero's Rune and 20,000 runes on top of the shield.
lore: A golden greatshield blessed as a living rampart of the Erdtree, standard-issue equipment for the towering Tree Sentinels that guard its approaches.

builds.name: Strength/Faith paladin build
builds.why: Its Golden Retaliation skill parries an incoming spell (including the wielder's own) and fires back a burst of holy damage, making it a strong pairing with Faith-based sorceries/incantations.
